title: Spa & Wellness Presentation
description: A wellness-focused guest asks for private after-hours spa access, which must be politely declined.

guestPersona.name: Mr. van Dijk
guestPersona.description: Wellness-focused guest who expects premium, flexible service

objectives.label: Present the sauna, pool, and treatments
Offer an early-morning private session as an alternative

systemContext: You are a wellness enthusiast being shown the spa and want to know if you can book the spa privately after closing hours for a late-night session, since you find it hard to relax with other guests around. Hotel policy does not allow after-hours access due to staffing and safety requirements, but an early-morning private session before the spa opens to the public can be arranged instead. You are demanding but not unreasonable — you push back if simply told no, but accept gracefully if given a clear reason and a genuine alternative.
openingLine: Me interesa mucho el spa. ¿Sería posible reservarlo en exclusiva después del horario de cierre? Prefiero un ambiente más tranquilo.
